channel.title: Pattaya Gym Directory - Jomtien venues
channel.description: Latest gyms, Muay Thai, dive, golf, and sport venues in Jomtien, Pattaya.

item.title: KBA Kiteboarding Asia Pattaya (Blue Lagoon)
item.description: KBA Pattaya kiteboarding + foiling school at Blue Lagoon Na Jomtien. Pattaya branch of Thailand's leading multi-location chain (also Samui, Phuket, Hua Hin, Phangan).

item.title: AF Academy Football School Pattaya
item.description: From age 3 — youngest accepted in Pattaya football. Multi-location. Russian/English/Thai. Indoor + outdoor fields.

item.title: Pattaya Park Water & Fun Park (with Tower Jump)
item.description: Original Pattaya 1989 complex. Tower Jump (170m zip line from 56th floor) + water park + private beach + amusement park.

item.title: Ocean Marina Jomtien — Southeast Asia's Largest Marina
item.description: Southeast Asia largest marina. 455 wet berths + 100 trailer + 30 hardstand. Yachts up to 75m. Award-winning. Top of the Gulf Regatta host. SailBreeze sailing school on-site. Yacht charter + brokerage hub. Customs clearance for international yachts.

item.title: Khao Chi Chan (Buddha Mountain) — Walking & Meditation
item.description: FREE public walking + meditation site. Worlds largest cliff Buddha image (109m × 70m, 24-carat gold). 1995-96 royal Jubilee commission. Landscaped gardens.

item.title: Pattaya Beach Public Aerobics — Open-Air Free Fitness
item.description: FREE open-air group fitness on Pattaya Beach + Jomtien Beach boardwalks. Daily Zumba aerobics, dance fitness, yoga, tai chi, stretching. No fee, no signup. Genuine Thai cultural fitness phenomenon. Pattaya most underrated daily wellness routine.

item.title: Pattaya Marriott Resort and Spa
item.description: 5-star Marriott Bonvoy beachfront resort on Na Jomtien Beach. Multiple outdoor pools, oceanfront fitness centre, Quan Spa (Marriott Asian-wellness signature), Kids Club, direct beach access. Asset World Corp operator.

item.title: Renaissance Pattaya Resort & Spa
item.description: 5-star Marriott Bonvoy Renaissance-brand beachfront resort, opened 2017. 257 rooms across 10 floors. 2 outdoor pools + kids pool + Kids Club + full-service spa + fitness centre. Modern design lifestyle brand. Na Jomtien beachfront.

item.title: Venum Training Camp Pattaya
item.description: Modern multi-discipline facility near Jomtien. Muay Thai, MMA, BJJ, Combat Fitness, S&C, kids program. 2 rings + cage/mat zone.

item.title: Rage Fight Academy
item.description: Multi-discipline academy: Muay Thai, Boxing, BJJ, MMA, Cross Training. 3 rings + BJJ/MMA mats. Education Visa sponsor for long-stays.

item.title: Pattaya Thai Boxing & Fitness Gym (Jomtien)
item.description: Walk-in budget gym in Jomtien. ~฿300 for equipment + 4-5 rounds of pads. Pro fighter Champ on roster. Air fans, no AC.

item.title: Fight EVO360 Muay Thai Gym
item.description: Combines traditional Muay Thai and boxing values with structured sports science and performance-based programming. Full profile in progress — confirm details with the venue.

item.title: Yoga Pattaya Studio
item.description: Pattaya's first international yoga studio. Ashtanga, Mysore, Hatha, Vinyasa Flow, Stretching, Fitness Yoga. English/Russian/Thai.

item.title: Ashtanga Yoga Pattaya
item.description: Traditional Ashtanga yoga studio offering Mysore-style self-practice and led primary series classes with hands-on adjustments. Soi 12 Thepprasit / Jomtien.

item.title: Nok Yoga Pattaya
item.description: Naklua / Pattaya-Naklua Road yoga studio offering Hatha, Vinyasa, and traditional Thai Reusi Dat Ton stretching for all levels with some sessions at Jomtien Beach.

item.title: Balance Yoga Studio Pattaya
item.description: Yoga + sound healing. Steps from the sea. 'Island of harmony in sunny Pattaya'.

item.title: Chee Chan Golf Resort
item.description: Premium destination golf resort in Na Jomtien / Sattahip with Buddha Mountain views, championship layout, and modern clubhouse facilities. ฿฿฿ green fees.

item.title: Greta Sport Club Pattaya (at Greta Resort)
item.description: 6 covered tennis courts with rain protection. Beautifully constructed roofed tennis venue.

item.title: TOS Tennis Club / TOS Tennis Academy
item.description: TOS Tennis Club / TOS Tennis Academy at Baan Suan Lalana — Jomtien Beach side tennis facility (closest to Jomtien) with hard courts, coaching, and social play.

item.title: Jomtien Public Swimming Pool
item.description: One of Pattaya's two public swimming pools — operated by the city on the South Pattaya / Jomtien border with affordable lap-swim access, kids' pool, and changing facilities.

item.title: Mermaid's Dive Center
item.description: PADI 5-Star IDC dive center. Day trips, courses beginner to instructor, technical diving.

item.title: No Limit Divers
item.description: PADI 5-Star Instructor Development Center based in Pattaya / Jomtien, offering full PADI internship programs from Open Water Diver through Course Director-level certification.

item.title: Jomtien Dive Center
item.description: PADI 5-Star Instructor Development Center on Jomtien Beach offering full PADI course progression from Open Water through Divemaster + Instructor — long-trusted operator.

item.title: Clubloongchat Watersports
item.description: Beachside watersports school: kitesurfing, wingfoiling, windsurfing, sailing, SUP. Expert lessons + rentals.

item.title: Kitesurf Pattaya
item.description: IKO-certified kitesurfing school at south end of Jomtien Beach. 3-day beginner package from $250 includes equipment, instruction, and IKO Level 1-2 certification.

item.title: Wave Pattaya Watersports
item.description: Multi-sport watersports operator across Pattaya Beach + Jomtien Beach — parasailing, jet ski, banana boat, SUP, kayak, plus arrangement of dive trips and beach activities.

item.title: Cartoon Network Amazone Waterpark (now Columbia Pictures Aquaverse)
item.description: World first themed waterpark. 18 slides across 3 zones. Polin Waterparks hardware. Rebranded 2022 to Sony Pictures IPs. 15km south of Pattaya.

item.title: Ramayana Water Park Pattaya
item.description: Largest water park in Thailand and Southeast Asia. 184,000 sqm. 26 slides / 34 lanes. 600m lazy river around natural hill. Double wave pool with 150m beach. TripAdvisor 2019 #1 Asia / #10 World.

item.title: SailBreeze Sailing School @ Ocean Marina Yacht Club
item.description: Thailand most experienced sailing school (20+ years). Based at Ocean Marina Jomtien — Southeast Asia largest marina (450+ berths). IYT certification + yacht charters.

item.title: Pattaya Cycling Clubs (Cuore Masters / Monkey Xtreme / Jomtien Cycling)
item.description: Multiple road and MTB clubs. Cuore Masters Team + Monkey Xtreme + Jomtien Cycling + Pattaya MTB. Free to ฿2,000/year.
